name: digitalmarketsact
description: I am building a website that will allow easy access to the text of the Digital Markets Act (DMA). The DMA is a European Regulation. European Regulations have a list of numbered recitals, followed by a set of Articles. Articles usually have numbered or lettered subparts. Usually each Article or subpart has one or more Recitals associated with it.

scripts.build: npm run build:11ty && npm run build:css
scripts.dev: concurrently -n 11ty,css -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:11ty" "npm run dev:css"
